title: Magex's Modernized Mobs
description: This Resource Pack aims to modernize all of Minecrafts outdated mobs
body:
If you **enjoy** this resource pack, consider supporting me on [buymeacoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magex_ya)!

![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f640fcff96af8348db38b1ef2a4cd58fa252ba5.png)
# About

Magex's Modernized Mobs is a texture pack that aims to modernize all of Minecrafts outdated mobs and the succesor of Magex's Better Ender Dragon. The pack is still work in progress.



# Features

- New Spider Model, 
- New Cave Spider Model, 
- New Blaze Model, 
- New Ender Dragon Model, 
- Adjusted Slime model, 
- Zombie variations, 
- New Cow/Mooshroom Model, 
- New Sheep Model, 
- New Pig Model, 
- New Chicken Model,
- New Baby Chicken Model,
- New Enderman Texture,
- New Endermite Model,
- New Witch Model, 
- Skeleton Model (with variatons), 
- New Wither Skeleton Model,
- New Snow Golem Model,
- New Iron Golem Model,
- New Rabbit Model,
- New Baby Rabbit Model

# In the next Updates

- Cow. pig and chicken variants,
- New Creeper Model, 
- New Polar Bear Model, 
- New Squid / Glow Squid Model
- Optifine variants to different mobs



# Requirements
